task_description: Fix blank News/Stories screens (missing API routes), fix Staking screen Boolean parsing error, and enhance Ngepet game: add guess animation for intruders, implement auto-lose logic, fix host guessing flow to stay on same UI, and split intruders list into Active/History tabs.

verification.summary: No build system or test suite available (Android project requires SDK not in sandbox). PHP syntax validated with php -l (passed). Code review confirms all changes are logically correct: API routes properly added, Staking model type fixed, NgepetViewModel has guessing state/animation/attempt tracking, NgepetGameScreen has animation overlay, intruder tabs, enhanced GuessResultDialog, and host guess re-open flow.
